Excellent Italian food! We stumbled upon this wonderful restaurant as we drove home from the wharf one evening and noticed that it was filled with diners and made a note to return the next evening. Small neighborhood restaurant with delicious authentic Italian cuisine.

Positives: Location is lovely; room is nice but intimate so get a good table; pasta dishes were good...not great but definitely good; I liked the staff. Negatives: the antipasto were uninspired and the Caeser salad was also weak, fresh but dull. Overall: Solid good but not great--3.7. If they zip up the appetizers they would go up 1/2 star in my opinion to a full 4.

Fresh, fresh, fresh.  The house-made pastas and the pristine fish were outstanding.  Small place, classic flavors.  Family run and a true delight.  One of the best Italian restaurants we've ever experienced.
